name: exa-search
title: Exa
description: AI-powered search for precise, context-aware results
author: thomas

commands.name: ask-exa
commands.title: Answer with Exa
commands.description: Get a grounded answer from Exa with compact citations.

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: The question to answer with Exa.

commands.name: open-in-browser
commands.title: Exa Search Engine
commands.description: Open Exa's search engine in your browser.

tools.name: search
tools.title: Search
tools.description: Search the live web with Exa and return compact result highlights.

tools.name: search-deep
tools.title: Search Deep
tools.description: Run a deeper Exa search with extra reasoning for research-heavy questions.

tools.name: get-answer
tools.title: Get Answer
tools.description: Get a grounded answer from Exa with compact citations.

tools.name: get-contents
tools.title: Get Contents
tools.description: Extract text or highlights from known URLs, together with per-URL statuses.

tools.name: get-code-context
tools.title: Get Code Context
tools.description: Retrieve code-focused context from Exa for framework, docs, and library questions.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
